package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for middleware_allocates_http_client_per_request: HTTP client allocated inside Gin handlers or middleware instead of being shared.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule325NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule325NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule325NegativeRecord) (Rule325NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario325Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule325NegativeService, input Rule325NegativeRecord) (Rule325NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule325NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
